balanced.label: Balanced Mode
balanced.summary: A full-featured experience with normal motion, full context, and standard visual intensity.
why_use_it: Keeps the system rich without being too stripped down.
Good when you want the full experience.
best_for: Users who want the full system experience.
balanced.recommended_when: Choose this when you want the full experience without reducing signal richness.

focus.label: Focus Mode
focus.summary: A cleaner view that dims the noise and emphasizes the strongest ideas and most relevant information.
why_use_it: Helpful when you want less clutter.
Pushes the strongest setups to the front.
Good when you want to make cleaner decisions faster.
focus.recommended_when: Choose this when you want stronger prioritization and less noise.

low_stim.label: Low Stim Mode
low_stim.summary: A calmer experience with softer motion, less visual pull, and more protective guidance when activity starts to spike.
why_use_it: Helpful when the platform starts to feel too intense.
Pairs well with overload detection and recovery prompts.
best_for: Users who get overwhelmed by visual intensity.
Recovery periods after a lot of switching around.
low_stim.recommended_when: Choose this when you want a softer, calmer environment with more protective guidance.
